title: Cage Bar: The Hunting Game
description:
Cage Bar: The Hunting Game - An Immersive Visual Interactive Novel. 
Core Plot Introduction: Vylan and Ivy were on vacation in an Alaskan town. To celebrate their anniversary, they entered the Cage Bar and unexpectedly found that their sister Lillian, who had been missing for eight years, had been transformed into a "human pig". They were dragged into the "Colorful Maze Death Hunting Ground" of the FX Group. They need to survive for seven days and escape the maze, otherwise they will become the protagonists of the next human pig show. With his wisdom and the guidance of the mysterious voice in his head, Vylan struggles against various dangers in the maze. At the same time, he also has to face Ivy's complicated thoughts. 
Worldview Atmosphere: The story constructs a world full of technology and darkness. The FX Group conducts human experiments in a remote town, transforming people into "human pigs" and holding cruel shows. The "Colorful Maze Death Hunting Ground" is full of unknowns and dangers. Genetically modified beasts, poisonous swarms of insects, and controlled human hunters threaten the lives of Vylan and Ivy. The entire worldview is full of science fiction colors and a depressing atmosphere.
Highlights of Female Character Interaction: Ivy shows a complex personality in the face of danger. Sometimes she is weak and dependent on Vylan, and sometimes she schemes against Vylan to save herself. The interaction between her and Vylan is full of emotional entanglements and considerations of interests, making the story more tortuous. 
Tension in Character Relationships: Vylan and Ivy are in a romantic relationship, but at the critical moment of life and death, Ivy's selfish scheming disappoints Vylan. Vylan has a deep relationship with his sister Lillian. After seeing his sister's tragic situation, he is determined to save her and take revenge on the FX Group. At the same time, there is also a fierce confrontation between Vylan and villains such as Victor and Cleopatra.
Scene Features: The story scenes are mainly concentrated in the "Colorful Maze Death Hunting Ground". The colorful metal walls are constantly rotating, full of a sense of science fiction. Scenes such as ventilation ducts and stages also have their own characteristics, increasing the tension and mystery of the story. 
Immersive Experience: Players will follow Vylan's perspective and delve into this dangerous world. Avoid various dangers in the maze and feel Vylan's anger, determination, and helplessness. At the same time, players can also feel the complex emotional entanglements between the characters, as if they were personally on the scene.
High - definition Visual Performance: The game uses high - definition pictures to vividly show the science - fiction scenes of the maze, the terrifying images of genetically modified beasts, and the expressions and actions of the characters. Every detail is handled very delicately, bringing a visual enjoyment to players. 
Functional Gameplay Features: The game supports offline play, allowing players to immerse themselves in the story anytime and anywhere. The one - key backtracking function makes it convenient for players to review important plots. The automatic playback function allows players to read the story more easily. The chapter browsing function allows players to quickly find the chapters they are interested in. The high - definition CG shows wonderful plot pictures, and the smooth reading experience allows players to enjoy every moment of the story.
description_short: During their vacation, Vylan and Ivy accidentally entered the Cage Bar and found that their sister Lillian had been transformed into a "human pig". They were dragged into the "Colorful Maze Death Hunting Ground". Vylan has to lead everyone to escape and take revenge within seven days.

upsells.name: Cage Bar: The Hunting Game - DLC
